CARD benefit
The fund for the interior decora-
ton of the Womans clubs new
building on Ninth and Walnut was
materially augmented yesterday by
the proceeds of benefit card party
given by Mrs. c. H. Paxon in the
palm room of the Madison hotel,
Mrs. d. B. Fotheringham was an
honor guests at the entertainment.
Bridge furnished the diversion.


= q Z


GIVES DINNER IN


HONOR OF PROMOTION
A dinner to celebrate his promo
tion to a first lieutenancy was
given by Second Lieutenant James
Blyth at Fort George Wright last
evening. Old comrades and friends,
as well as number of young men
from the city, were his guests.


Z q 4


WILL FORMALLY OPEN


CLUB HOUSE ON MONDAY
Members of the Woman's club
will hold a house warming party
on Monday, december 8, at which
time all the women club members
Of the city will be invited to in
spect the appointments of the build
ing. The hours of reception will
be from 2 until 5 o'clock.
